TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 5 

SOURCE: CMS Common Medicare Environment (CME) 

VALUES: The first character of the contract ID is a letter or number representing the type of plan: 
H = Managed care organizations other than a regional PPO (i.e., local MA-PDs, 1876 and 1833 cost 
plans, Program of All-Inclusive Care for the Elderly (PACE) plans, private fee-for-service plans,
